title: HRCW Register Row
description: One row of Table 1 — the legal HRCW trigger map. Maps a single Schedule 1 category to the packages that genuinely trigger it. This is NOT the risk register.

schedule_1_item.description: Schedule 1 item number. Must equal the numeric part of ref.

category_title.description: Canonical Schedule 1 category wording. Validator checks against /knowledge/schedule-1.json — must not be paraphrased.

triggered.description: CONDITIONAL = triggered only where a stated site condition is confirmed (e.g. confined space on assessment).

trigger_status.description: Operational HRCW status. Confirmed HRCW drives active SWMS scope; conditional/status-only rows drive confirmations, hold points and stop-work controls.

condition.description: The specific condition under which a CONDITIONAL category applies. Required when triggered = CONDITIONAL.

packages.description: Trade packages that genuinely trigger this category. Empty only when triggered = NO. Each name must match the package names used in the SWMS Matrix and Risk Register.

blanket_all_packages.description: True only if the trigger genuinely spans all packages. Requires blanket_justification.

blanket_justification.description: Why an all-packages trigger is justified. Required when blanket_all_packages = true.

risk_description.description: What creates the HRCW risk for the listed packages. Empty when triggered = NO.

assessment_confirmed.description: True only where a required formal assessment has confirmed the category applies, such as H06 confined space. Phase 3 validators decide when this is mandatory.

swms_required.description: Whether a SWMS is required for this category. CONDITIONAL = required only where the condition is confirmed.

basis_refs.description: Legal or code reference IDs supporting the HRCW assessment.

source_fact_refs.description: Project-fact IDs or approved source refs that support a confirmed HRCW status.

confirmation_item_refs.description: Confirmation item IDs that must be resolved before this row can become confirmed.

supporting_document_refs.description: Supporting document IDs linked to this trigger.

override_allowed.description: True only where a professional/audited override is permitted for this row.

override_reason.description: Audit reason for an override decision.

approved_by.description: Person or role approving the override.

source_or_basis.description: Evidence or source basis for the override.

notes.description: Conditions, permits or contingencies. Must not state that the principal contractor 'approves' a subcontractor SWMS.
